description: Missing hyperbus_phy.sv variant-selector module: tops instantiated hyperbus_phy but only _generic/_altera/_xilinx existed; design would not elaborate. Verify created the selector.
Generic PHY read-capture sampled DQ on the RWDS edge (data transition) -> shifted/garbage read words. Fixed to sample at DDR eye centres in the clk domain.
Generic PHY CK-gating produced a runt/extra pulse (clk90-domain resample) -> phantom 0x0000 word corrupted CR0 program and shifted writes. Fixed by gating clk90 with the clk-domain enable.
run.sh defined BENCH_SRCS but never invoked tb_bw (harness/flow gap, not RTL). Added the tb_bw run line.
Stale qsys make_bw_sys.qpf/.qsf blocked qsys-script regeneration. Cleaned scratch project.
Mismatched _0/_1 IP instance naming between regenerated sub-IP and bw.qsf IP_FILE lines. Normalised to deterministic names.

UNRESOLVED: IOPLL cannot route clk(0deg, DQ DDIOs) + clk90(90deg, hb_ck DDIO) both into the I/O region (Quartus Err 24403/24404). hb_ck eye-centering needs the 2nd phase at the I/O; real fix = physical floorplan of hb_ck pad into a separate I/O sub-bank (needs AXC3000 package bank map) or hardened DDR-I/O. Not faked with single-phase CK.

hb_ck/hb_cs_n on wrong balls: used User-Guide C7/B5, board actually wires D7/D8 (Arrow refdes, authoritative). Two vendor sources disagreed; caught ONLY on silicon (HyperRAM got no clock/select -> no transaction completed). Fixed pins.tcl to D7/D8 + re-fit.

UNRESOLVED: with correct pins the HyperRAM still does not complete transactions on hardware (WR_CYC constant vs LEN, RD_CYC free-runs, STATUS busy+error never done). Control plane (JTAG-Avalon+CSR, MAGIC=HBWT) works. Needs SignalTap-level observation of hb_ck/hb_dq/hb_rwds/hb_cs_n during a transaction to isolate init/latency/read-capture. rework_min open.

SDR PHY paired the device READ PREAMBLE (RWDS toggles with DQ Hi-Z before real data) into a phantom {0x00,0x00} word -> read hang. Fixed: RD_PREAMBLE_SKIP=1 (skip the leading preamble RWDS edge). Caught only on silicon via on-chip capture; reproduced in sim after modelling the preamble.
Read FIFOs (ctrl rd_fifo + PHY RXF) depth 8 capped completing reads at ~5 words; 16-word bursts hung. Fixed: deepened 8->32.
